title: Slice 1 — Read-only Screens (Hub, Hierarchy, Store Detail, Login)
notes: Foundation screens. Read-only. Terminology adapter built. Screen visibility matrix established.

title: Slice 2 — Pending Queues, Transfer Detail, Status Timeline
notes: Operational inbox. Three queue tabs. Transfer detail with contextual actions.

title: Slice 3 — History & Ledger, Date/Status Filters
notes: Transfer history with filters. Stock ledger view. Date range support.

title: Slice 4 — Transfer Write Flows (Dispatch, Request, Approve, Reject, Receive, Cancel)
notes: All transfer mutation flows. Source selector. Confirmation dialogs. 52/52 API tests pass.

title: Slice 5 — Stock Adjustment, Wastage, Source Selector, Seed Shutdown
notes: 7 phases. Stock adjustment (Central-only), wastage (all roles), wastage report, seed data shutdown, POS API migration. 55/57 QA pass.

title: P17 — Amend / Withdraw / Modification
notes: Transfer edit/amend by source. Withdraw flow. Status reset on edit.

title: P17-Settings — Operational Settings CRUD
notes: Settings management screen. Lateral transfer toggle. Config CRUD.

title: P18 — Vendor Management CRUD
notes: Vendor list, create, edit, delete.

title: P19 — Add Stock / Procurement
notes: Procurement form with vendor, batch, expiry, unit selection.

title: P20 — Stock Inventory Summary (Self-Store)
notes: Self-store inventory view. 14/14 FE + 11/11 BE tests pass. Hierarchy toggle deferred.

title: P21 — Catalogue CRUD (Ingredient/Product/Recipe/Addon-Recipe)
notes: Full CRUD for 4 catalogue types. 17/17 FE + 19/19 BE tests pass.

title: P21-Gaps — Food Category + Addon CRUD + Ingredient Rename
notes: Gap closure. 17/17 FE + 30/30 BE tests pass.

title: P22 — Daily Consumption Report
notes: Consumption report with date filter, role scoping. 12/12 FE tests pass.

title: P23 — Hierarchy Management + Bundle Push
notes: Hierarchy CRUD, franchise push, store creation. 12/12 FE tests pass.

title: P24 — FEFO Batch Stock Detail Panel
notes: API validated (19 probes). 3-phase implementation complete. GAP-1 (store name) + GAP-2 (action buttons) fixed. QA PASS iteration_41.

title: P20-Phase2 — Stock Inventory Hierarchy Toggle
notes: Hierarchy toggle for Master/Central users. Heatmap, KPI, alert banner. 12/12 tests pass. ~155 lines added. | Re-QA required: useStockInventory.js hook + api.js getStockInventory param lost during repo sync. Fixed 2026-06-13. Awaiting re-test.

title: P21-Smart — Smart Dispatch / Request Assistance
notes: Brainstorm-level planning only. Low-stock suggestions on dispatch form. ~10-15h estimate.

title: P25 — Wastage Report Enhancements
notes: Enhanced wastage report features. API validated.

title: Intelligent UI Freeze — Screen Intelligence Layer
notes: ALL 24 screens approved. Phase 7 frozen. Implementation handed off to CR-021.

title: Daily Intelligence Digest (SMS + WhatsApp + Email)
notes: Auto-generated daily summary: expiring items, stale approvals, stores needing restocking. Channels: SMS, WhatsApp, Email. Owner confirmed: next phase, not now.

title: Intelligent UI Implementation — Sprint A+B+C + Polish
notes: Retroactive registration. 22+ screens upgraded, 6 new files, 26 modified. 55/55 tests PASS + 6 additional screen fixes + Procurement 3-mode upgrade. Governance gap: work started without CR registration.

title: Code Quality Review Fixes — Security + React Patterns
notes: Retroactive registration. Hardcoded secrets removed, array-index keys fixed, stale closure fixed, empty catches logged.

title: API Reality Check, Data Seed & Intelligence Gap Fix
notes: Fix 18 API-mismatch bugs from audit. Proper control gate this time.

title: API Response Cache — Performance Optimization
notes: In-memory cache with TTL. 71→20 API calls (72% reduction). Gate waived (velocity exception).

title: Coverage-Based Intelligent PO — Request Stock + Direct Dispatch
notes: Coverage selector (3/7/10/30d), consumption-based ordering, threshold fallback, integrated dispatch table. Gate waived (velocity exception).

title: P28 — Production Unit Module (Production Run UI + History)
notes: Production Run form + audit detail + history (G-018 stub). 3 new files, 6 modified. Backend gaps: G-018 (history list API), G-019 (segment unit_cost). Owner requested 2026-06-13.

title: Navigation Restructure — Grouped Sidebar (INWARD / PRODUCTION / OUTWARD / REPORTS / SETTINGS)
notes: Grouped sidebar sections: DASHBOARD, INWARD (Vendor Management, Raw Material Master, Purchase), PRODUCTION (Sub-Recipe Master, Run Production, Production History), OUTWARD (Store Management, Product Catalog, Stock Inventory, Pending Queues, History & Ledger), REPORTS (Consumption, Wastage), SETTINGS. Renames: Vendors→Vendor Management, Ingredients→Raw Material Master, Add Stock→Purchase, Products→Product Catalog. Remove Recipe + Addon Recipe as separate nav items (absorbed into Product Catalog). Hierarchy Summary merged into Store Management.

title: Product Catalog Overhaul — Excel-like Bulk Editor + Inline Recipe/Addon/Sub-Recipe Linking
notes: Full redesign of Products page → Product Catalog. Excel-like spreadsheet UI with: inline cell editing, bulk upload (Excel import), Excel export, column toggles, mandatory category enforcement, search + filter, unsaved changes indicator, + Add Item quick row. Each product shows linked Recipe, Sub-Recipe, and Addons inline. Expand row to see ingredient BOM from sub-recipe. Category is compulsory — UX enforces without friction. Reference: owner-shared screenshot of bulk editor pattern.

title: Stock Inventory Split — Finished Goods vs Raw Materials Tabs
notes: Split Stock Inventory into tabs: Finished Goods (items with subrecipe_id / is_sub_recipe) and Raw Materials (ingredient type). Each tab shows own KPIs, own table. Optional 'All' tab for power users. Clarifies the inward/outward confusion — raw materials are inward procurement, FG is outward distribution.
